intel.title: [CISA KEV] Microsoft SharePoint Server - Microsoft SharePoint Server Deserialization of Untrusted Data Vulnerability
intel.raw_content:
CVE: CVE-2026-45659
廠商: Microsoft
產品: SharePoint Server
漏洞名稱: Microsoft SharePoint Server Deserialization of Untrusted Data Vulnerability
說明: Microsoft SharePoint Server contains a deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability which allows an authorized attacker to execute code over a network.
CISA 要求措施: Apply mitigations in accordance with vendor instructions, ensuring compliance with CISA’s BOD 26-04 Prioritizing Security Updates Based on Risk (see URL in Notes) guidance and CISA’s “Forensics Triage Requirements” (see URL in Notes). Follow applicable BOD 26-04 guidance for cloud services or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Stakeholders are responsible for evaluating each asset's internet exposure and ensuring adherence to BOD 26-04 patching guidelines.
修補截止日: 2026-07-04
已知勒索軟體利用: Unknown

analysis.summary: Microsoft SharePoint Server 存在不受信任資料的反序列化漏洞（CVE-2026-45659），允許已授權的攻擊者透過網路執行任意程式碼。此漏洞已被 CISA 列入已知遭利用漏洞清單（KEV），具有高度的安全威脅。
analysis.recommendation: 公司資產清冊未包含受影響資產，無需處置。
